description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume from Rasasi is for the contemporary women. Product Details Rasasi Vanity is a perfume spray for women comes in an elegant glass flask with engraved metallic design detail Size 100 ml
